session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: write a dialogue between a cat and a canary on the edge of being eaten. the canary should plead for a swift death
log.response: Cat: (nervously) Canary, I'm scared! What's going to happen to me? Canary: (flitting about nervously, flapping its wings frantically) Don't worry, Cat. We'll be out of here before you know it. Cat: But what if something goes wrong? How will we survive? Canary: Oh come on now, let's just take a deep breath and focus. It won't be that bad. Cat: (sighing) Alright, alright. Just don't make me do this alone. I can handle it. (They both jump into the cage) Cat: (whining as they exit) You're so brave. Canaries should never be afraid of death. Canary: (laughing nervously) Yeah, well, you know what? I think we might just make it out alive after all.
